scripts.start:frontend: concurrently -n admin,host,shop,product,auth,user-profile "npm run start --workspace=services/admin" "npm run start --workspace=services/host" "npm run start --workspace=services/shop" "npm run start --workspace=services/product" "npm run start --workspace=services/auth" "npm run start --workspace=services/user-profile"
scripts.build:frontend: concurrently -n admin,host,shop,header,productPage,auth "npm run build:prod --workspace=services/admin" "npm run build:prod --workspace=services/host" "npm run build:prod --workspace=services/shop" "npm run build:prod --workspace=services/product" "npm run build:prod --workspace=services/auth"
